modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to send envelope with multiple templates in DocuSign.

full_description_text: User is trying to send an envelope that includes multiple templates. They have different templates for different situations but can't figure out how to apply them all at once. This is causing issues in their workflow.
short_description: Unable to send envelope with multiple templates in DocuSign.
description: User is trying to send an envelope that includes multiple templates. They have different templates for different situations but can't figure out how to apply them all at once. This is causing issues in their workflow.
